validation_results.command: for wp in SOURCE DISTILL CLOSURE ELEMENTS PATTERNS; do PYTHONPATH=repository/src python3 -m drd_harness.cli.main candidate-check build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-$wp --review-decision build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-$wp/REVIEW_DECISION.json || exit 1; done

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-COMPILER')
contracts=json.loads((root/'P3_COMPILER_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for artifact in contracts['required_artifacts']:
    schema_ref=artifact.get('schema_ref')
    if schema_ref is None:
        continue
    schema=json.loads(Path(schema_ref).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    required=schema['items']['required'] if schema.get('type') == 'array' else schema['required']
    assert artifact['minimum_fields'] == required, artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['record_minimum_fields'] == required, artifact['artifact_id']
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: schema-bound compiler artifact minimum_fields match current required schema fields

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
contracts=json.loads(Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-COMPILER/P3_COMPILER_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
structured_required={'artifact_id','stage_id','fixture_id','path','schema_ref','schema_payload_key','source_refs','upstream_artifact_refs','upstream_hashes','validator_ref','review_gate','promotion_state','invalidation_inputs'}
markdown_required={'artifact_id','stage_id','fixture_id','path','source_refs','upstream_artifact_refs','upstream_hashes','validator_ref','review_gate','promotion_state','invalidation_inputs'}
by_id={a['artifact_id']:a for a in contracts['required_artifacts']}
for artifact in contracts['required_artifacts']:
    if artifact['payload_shape'] == 'markdown_text':
        assert artifact['container_shape'] == 'markdown_file_with_structured_sidecars', artifact['artifact_id']
        assert set(artifact['artifact_envelope_fields']) == markdown_required, artifact['artifact_id']
    else:
        assert artifact['container_shape'] == 'artifact_envelope_with_payload', artifact['artifact_id']
        assert set(artifact['artifact_envelope_fields']) == structured_required, artifact['artifact_id']
assert contracts['semantic_authority_rule']['inventory_role'] == 'index_and_validation_skeleton_only'
assert contracts['semantic_authority_rule']['compiler_role'] == 'deterministic mechanical assembly and conservation checking only'
assert {'semantic_content_hash','sections','semantic_units','current_hashes'} <= set(by_id['p3.compiler.input_bundle']['p3_required_fields'])
assert {'atomic_unit_validation','prose_authority_refs'} <= set(by_id['p3.compiler.semantic_unit_inventory']['p3_required_fields'])
assert 'approved_body_preservation' in by_id['p3.compiler.final_drd_text']['p3_required_fields']
assert 'mutation_claim' in by_id['p3.compiler.read_only_qa_boundary']['p3_required_fields']
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: compiler artifacts declare envelope fields, payload shape, semantic authority rule, and P3-required compiler bindings

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-COMPILER')
artifacts=json.loads((root/'P3_COMPILER_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
rules=json.loads((root/'P3_COMPILER_PIPELINE_RULES.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
validation=json.loads((root/'P3_COMPILER_VALIDATION_MATRIX.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
trace=json.loads((root/'P3_COMPILER_TRACEABILITY_MAP.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert len(artifacts['required_artifacts']) == 9
assert len(rules['ordered_steps']) == 10
assert len(rules['compiler_rules']) == 15
assert len(validation['validation_rows']) == 12
assert len(trace['traceability_rows']) == 13
assert all(not obj.get('open_blockers') for obj in [artifacts, rules, validation, trace])
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: artifact contracts, pipeline rules, validation rows, and traceability rows are structurally complete

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-COMPILER')
scope=json.loads((root/'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for path in scope['actual_writes']:
    assert Path(path).is_file(), path
assert scope['forbidden_write_violations'] == []
assert scope['repository_files_modified'] is False
assert scope['control_locks_modified'] is False
assert scope['p1_files_modified'] is False
assert scope['p2_files_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_source_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_distill_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_closure_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_elements_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_patterns_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_layout_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['root_p3_phase_files_modified'] is False
assert scope['not_a_spec_lock'] is True
assert scope['not_a_build_lock'] is True
assert scope['not_an_implementation'] is True
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: scope report actual writes exist and no forbidden repository, lock, P1, P2, prior P3 candidate, or root P3 phase files changed
